headline: Tech's AI capex reckoning meets an oil shock — the weekend gap into Monday carries both risks unresolved, with MSFT/META and the FOMC decision arriving together on Wednesday
Oil at triple digits plus Alphabet/Tesla AI capex sticker shock push all four indices lower, with NDX bearing the heaviest weight and Intel's after-close report the next swing factor
Megacap earnings binary meets oil risk: tonight's Alphabet and Tesla prints — not the intraday tape — own Thursday's open
NDX bouncing in negative gamma below the 29,595 flip — GOOGL + TSLA Wednesday night is the week’s volatility gate; gap risk stays Extreme.
Day-9 Iran airstrikes + Houthi Saudi embargo collide with peak Mag-7 earnings week — NDX in negative gamma, SPX one tick above its flip.
